nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Trigger: Receives new support ticket via HTTP POST. Fields: name, email, issue_type, priority, description, timestamp

nodes.name: Validate & Transform
nodes.notes: Validates email, priority, issue type. Normalizes text. Deduplicates within 24h window. Generates unique ticket IDs.

nodes.name: Route & Assign SLA
nodes.notes: Routes tickets: wifi→Network, login→IT Support, software→Applications, hardware→Infrastructure, other→General. Calculates SLA deadline: High=4h, Medium=24h, Low=72h.

nodes.name: Has Processed Tickets?
nodes.notes: Checks if there are valid processed tickets before storing

nodes.name: Store Processed Tickets
nodes.notes: Stores valid/processed tickets. In production: connect to Google Sheets, PostgreSQL, Airtable, or any database node.

nodes.name: Store Rejected Tickets
nodes.notes: Stores rejected/error tickets with reason. In production: connect to a separate sheet or error log database.

nodes.name: Generate Summary Report
nodes.notes: Generates summary report: total received, processed vs rejected, tickets per team and priority. Export to CSV/Excel in production.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns final summary report as JSON response to the webhook caller

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Catches any workflow errors: invalid input, storage failure, unknown issue type. Logs and returns structured error response.

meta.description: Assessment 1 - IT Support Ticket Automation. Processes university IT support tickets end-to-end: validates email/priority/issue type, deduplicates within 24h, routes to teams, assigns SLA deadlines, stores processed/rejected tickets, generates summary report.
